titleStmt.title: SII 22.528: original edition by G.V. Srinivasa Rao
No. 528. (A.R. No. 528 of 1906) ANANATAPUR DISTRICT, KADIRI TALUK, KADIRI On the base of a big gōpura, right and left sides of Lakshmīnarasiṁhasvāmi temple. Date lost

summary.p: Mutilated. Gives the genealogy of the first Vijayanagara dynasty. It mentions king Bukka and his minister Viṭṭhalāmātya, the son of Dēvapāmātya of Bhārgavamuni-gōtra and seems to refer to the construction of the gōpura probably by the latter (Viṭṭhala).

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śriyaṁ pūṣṇātuvaḥ ślāghyāṁ śukalādharaṁ . jananījanaśvābhyāṁ vicalaṁ vimalaṁ mahaḥ . 1 . Avatu bhuvanaṁ varāhaḥ śaśadharadhavaḷasyayasyadaṁṣṭrāgrē . bhāti vasudhā mādrau jaladharapaṭalīva śikharapa¨ryyaṁtē . 2 . pāśusavaḥ karipadanō
vadanēna bhramaraśīlakuṁḍēśa . kucakuṁbharōmarājīsārūpyaṁ vahaśimāśuraniśaṁ yaḥ . 3 . Astitrailōkī sayanābhirāmaṁ tējaḥ paraṁtāpaharaṁ janānāṁ . yadaṣṭamū¨rttērapi mū¨rttibhēdaṁ vāmaṁ murārapu nētra
muhuḥ . 4 . kadaṁnda vāyōbhapadugratējāḥ purūravāḥ pāda sarōnrupāṇāṁ . śakatraku¨ryyēsadhanu¨rdharēṇa śacīkuca spa¨rśasukhaṁ vivēda . 5 . vaṁśēśadīyō balabhitsvabhāvō yayātirāsīdari vīrahaṁtā matōpriyaḥ pratyaha mū¨rji
ka¨rthāsanaṁgō ri . 6 . yadu kōbhūduḍu rājakalpaḥ kalpadrumāṇāmiva ṣṭabōdhaḥ . yasyāvatāra ? yasyaṁtivṛttāṁstridaśēśvarāṇāṁ prastāpanā jāṁ . 7 . yadōścaṁdra
mivasmarāri . yatrāpaśī¨rnnaḥ kilaśājñādhanvācō¨rnnīkarōti smasurāriva¨rgaṁ . 8 . paṁśētasmiṁnnajanirajanīnātha cūḍāṁghri padmadvaṁdvadhyānaprasṛmara sudhāsaṁśamasyaṁ gamōḥ . miṁdraḥ yatpratya¨rthikṣitipavaniśāka ¨rnnakāṭaṁka lakṣmīkī¨rtti
mācakurima prauḍha bāhāpta bhāvaḥ . 10 . tasyāśmajōbhūdaraviṁda baṁdhō¨rmmasu¨ryyathā bukkaṇa bhūmipālaḥ . rājasvatī bhūrajaniṣpayēnatriviṣṭava śrīriva vāsavēna . 11 . nakharaphaṇāmaṇaucaṭula khaḍgalakāsanē
yasyadō¨rdaṁḍa pāṁḍitya ni¨rmāṇa paramāṇavaḥ . . 22 . ghanaśaila garīyasitridivādastitadīya rājadhānī . bhuvanatraya saurabhūmiru¨rvyāmukuraśrīrivamauktikaiḥ prakluptā . 27 . vudyāna vākṛrudi kai¨ryna
dīyyāṁ 1 kruṣṇa bhṛṁgēṣpamaradrumēgha . Abhukta śēṣāṇi surābhilōkē puṣpāṇyavakāsayaṁśi . 24 . mahāgajānāṁ madani¨rbhbarāṇāṁ kuṁbhēgha yaśrāṁkuśakāḍanānāṁ . kṛśōdarīṇāṁ kucakāṁticā¨ryaṁ nimittamaṁnyadvya
padēśamātraṁ . 25 . vasaṁsakasyā bhujagēṁdra kalpabhujā¨rjitārāśi vibhūti va¨rgaḥ . vaśīkarōtismavaśaṁ padaśrī Āvāri rāśikṣitimappratīpaḥ . 26 . vijitya pṛthvīvalayaṁ samastamāva¨rjyamauḷiṁ pratibhūpatīnāṁ . svadō¨rji
yaṁgāvayatēsmabhūmau kī¨rtya¨rjunō ni¨rjarakannakābhiḥ . 27 . mauni bhā¨rgavanō krō bhūktāsyamaṁ śrīmahāmatiḥ . viṭhalāmātya tilakō dēvapāmātyanaṁdanaḥ . 28 . viṭhalamaṁtri jayaśādbhrū līlāmātra vijita bhūvalayaḥ . gurubudhakavi kamalō
dbhava pariṣadabhūdyasya kāraṇaṁ kruṣṭēḥ . 29 . Ā saṁbhaya saṁbhramāda pāku¨rvvārmēyōnēstavaṁ . sō bhūtārāṁsbhujagēṁdra saṁhara rthē praṁkhagēśakṛja . padmabhūṣaṇa tyājñāvai
kkī¨rtti mudrāyatē . 30 . sakēna śāsaṁ nikhilāḥ prajāsvādhya¨rmmāsanasthassura maṁtrikalpaiḥ . vidvadbhira¨rthānakhilāṁ maṁnyakā¨rththaṁ varamīśa sēvāṁ . 31 . śarīriṇaṁ vā¨rdira ramāṇāṁ
yama[¨rpyō*]cikaṁ sva¨rgāmarōktākti vidhaunyayuṁjiṁ . 32 . kadirītināmapuramasti viśrutaṁ narakēsari sa¨rvvadā . racayēma tatrapura gōpuraṁ vayaṁ paramēśvarōbhavatu naḥ prasannadhīḥ . 33 . nrukēsari .
Digital edition of SII 22.528 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
